title: Yoshi's Random Things
body:
this mod adds some Random Stuff i made while i was bored

most of the stuff is just for having fun and has not much of a practical use

---

**currently adds:**

***-Flesh Blade:***
 *very powerful weapon with almost no weapon cooldown
 but also very low durability that refills overtime when the weapon isn't in it's active state*

***-Water Balloon:***
 *fun item with no practical use then just looking cool*

***-Molotov Cocktail:***
 *throw it with a flint and steel in offhand, when the flint and steel has multishot you will throw three at
 the same time,
 when they hit something they will spread a lot of fire*

***-Magic Scroll:***
 *use magic to shoot a dragon fireball*

***-Fire Extinguisher:***
 *does what it says and will extinguish fire*

***-Reverse Card:***
 *teleports you to the world spawn*

***-Dual Katanas:***
 *not that practical as weapons and still a bit unpolished but if you would like to use them you can*

***-Sweet Berry Shotgun:***
 *a shotgun that shoots sweet berries that don't deal much damage,
 maybe useful to intimidate someone*

 ---

[CurseForge Page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/yoshis-random-things)


---

*made with MCreator*
